text.title: Contractor Audition Rubric Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Contractor Audition Rubric end-to-end. Run sequentially — each step has a decision-gate.

step.name: collect-typed-inputs
step.input: Engagement notes; named input artefacts per Prerequisites table.
step.action: Load each input by path / URL. Reject any missing input; do not synthesize from prior knowledge.
step.output: Typed `inputs_used` list with name + source per row.
step.decision-gate: If any required input is missing, STOP and surface the gap to the operator.

step.name: check-applies-if
step.action: Verify every `Applies If` clause in AGENTS.md holds. Walk `06-decision-tree.xml` from the root question.
step.output: Applies / skip decision with the rule-id citation.
step.decision-gate: If decision == skip, emit a `skip-this-methodology` artefact with the reason and STOP.

step.name: draft-rubric
step.action: Fill the `rubric` schema from `templates/contractor-audition-rubric.json`. Each field must trace to an input by name.
step.output: Draft artefact conforming to the schema.
step.decision-gate: If any required field is unsourced, return to step 1 with the gap list.

step.name: self-check-failure-modes
step.action: Run each antipattern detector from `03-failure-modes.xml`. Apply the prescribed `fix` for any match.
step.decision-gate: If a high-severity antipattern matches, block and revise; do not pass to validator.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-contractor-audition-rubric.py --file <path>`. On exit 0, write to the artefact store and surface the `ready for owner review` flag.
step.output: Stored artefact with version + last_reviewed, plus the review-flag signal.
step.decision-gate: On validator failure, return the violation list to the subagent and re-iterate from step 3.
